description: Talbot uses his gravitonium powers to take himself and Coulson onto the Remorath mothership. There, they are confronted by Qovas and his guards. Talbot quickly establishes his dominance, demanding the Remorath kneel to him, and demonstrates his new abilities, forcing a surrender. Coulson tries to keep Talbot's aggression in check, setting the stage for their negotiations.

transcript.line: Still no word from our forces below?
You and I are gonna show these ETs who's boss. Don't worry. I can fix this.
I really wish you'd stop saying that.
